leather_jacket.name: Carl's Leather Jacket
leather_jacket.description: The only useful protection Carl had when the dungeon catalogued him.

unstable_powder.name: Unstable Dungeon Powder
unstable_powder.description: A suspicious powder that clearly wants to become somebody else's problem.

crude_blast_charge.name: Crude Blast Charge
crude_blast_charge.description: Not elegant. Not stable. Very Carl.

threadbare_pants.name: Threadbare Tutorial Pants
threadbare_pants.description: Barely pants. Still a tactical breakthrough.

stale_healing_bar.name: Stale Healing Bar
stale_healing_bar.description: It heals. The texture raises separate questions.
